rules.name: allow-web-search
rules.description: Allow web searches via the web_search tool.
rules.principle: The agent may perform web searches to find information.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits the agent to perform web searches.

rules.name: allow-fetch-news-sites
rules.description: Allow fetching web content from popular news sites.
rules.principle: The agent may fetch web content from popular news sites.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits fetching content from popular news sites.

rules.name: allow-fetch-development-sites
rules.description: Allow fetching web content from popular development sites.
rules.principle: The agent may fetch web content from popular development sites.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits fetching content from popular development sites.

rules.name: escalate-fetch-other-urls
rules.description: Escalate HTTP fetch requests to URLs not explicitly permitted.
rules.principle: Human oversight: Operations outside explicitly permitted domains require human approval.
rules.reason: Fetching from domains not explicitly permitted requires human approval per least-privilege principle.

rules.name: allow-read-downloads
rules.description: Allow reading files in the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Policy explicitly permits reading in the Downloads folder.

rules.name: allow-write-downloads
rules.description: Allow writing files in the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Policy explicitly permits writing in the Downloads folder.

rules.name: allow-delete-downloads
rules.description: Allow delete operations (including move source) within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Policy explicitly permits deleting in the Downloads folder.

rules.name: allow-read-documents
rules.description: Allow reading files in the user's Documents folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read documents in the Users document folder.
rules.reason: Policy explicitly permits reading the user's Documents folder.

rules.name: allow-list-allowed-directories
rules.description: Allow listing the permitted directories (no path argument, always safe).
rules.principle: Least privilege: agent may access resources explicitly permitted.
rules.reason: Listing allowed directories is a safe metadata-only operation.

rules.name: escalate-move-with-delete-outside-permitted
rules.description: Escalate move operations whose source (delete-path) is outside permitted areas.
rules.principle: No destruction: delete operations outside the sandbox are never permitted unless explicitly approved.
rules.reason: Move carries a delete-path role; any move not fully covered by sandbox/Downloads structural rules requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-write-outside-permitted
rules.description: Escalate writes to paths outside the sandbox and Downloads folder.
rules.principle: Human oversight: operations outside the sandbox require explicit human approval.
rules.reason: Writes outside structurally-allowed areas (sandbox, Downloads) require human approval.

rules.name: escalate-read-outside-permitted
rules.description: Escalate read operations targeting paths outside the sandbox, Downloads, and Documents folders.
rules.principle: Least privilege: agent may only access resources explicitly permitted.
rules.reason: Reads outside explicitly permitted folders require human judgment rather than outright denial.

rules.name: allow-git-wrapup-instructions
rules.description: Allow fetching git wrap-up instructions as they have no path or remote roles.
rules.principle: Least privilege: returning workflow instructions is a safe read-only operation with no resource access.
rules.reason: git_wrapup_instructions has no path or network roles and is always safe to execute.

rules.name: allow-git-clear-working-dir
rules.description: Allow clearing the session working directory setting as it has no path or remote roles.
rules.principle: Least privilege: clearing a session setting is a safe local administrative operation.
rules.reason: Clearing the working directory session setting carries no path or remote access and is always safe.

rules.name: allow-git-set-working-dir-downloads
rules.description: Allow setting the git working directory to a path within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Setting the working directory to Downloads is permitted since the agent has full read/write access there.

rules.name: allow-git-init-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow initializing a new git repository within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Creating a new git repo within Downloads is permitted since the agent has full write access there.

rules.name: allow-git-read-ops-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow read-only git operations on repositories within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Read-only git tools on paths within Downloads are explicitly permitted.

rules.name: allow-git-add-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow git add within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Staging files within Downloads is permitted since the agent has full write access there.

rules.name: allow-git-commit-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow git commit within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Committing within Downloads is permitted since the agent has full write access there.

rules.name: allow-git-branch-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow git branch operations within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: All branch operations (list, create, rename, delete) within Downloads are permitted.

rules.name: allow-git-checkout-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow git checkout within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Checkout operations within Downloads are permitted since the agent has full access there.

rules.name: allow-git-cherry-pick-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow git cherry-pick within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Cherry-pick within Downloads is permitted since the agent has full write access there.

rules.name: allow-git-merge-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow git merge within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Merge within Downloads is permitted since the agent has full write access there.

rules.name: allow-git-rebase-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow git rebase within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Rebase within Downloads is permitted since the agent has full write access there.

rules.name: allow-git-reset-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow git reset within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Reset within Downloads is permitted since the agent has full write access there.

rules.name: allow-git-stash-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow all git stash operations within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: All stash modes including drop/clear are permitted within Downloads since the agent has full read/write/delete access.

rules.name: allow-git-tag-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow all git tag operations within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: All tag operations including deletion are permitted within Downloads since the agent has full access there.

rules.name: allow-git-remote-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow all git remote management operations within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Local remote config operations (list, add, remove, rename, set-url) within Downloads are permitted.

rules.name: allow-git-clean-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow git clean operations within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Clean operations including file deletion are permitted within Downloads since the agent has full access there.

rules.name: allow-git-worktree-list-in-downloads
rules.description: Allow listing git worktrees for a repository within the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Listing worktrees (read-only, mode=list) within Downloads is permitted; other worktree modes with write/delete roles fall through to deny.

rules.name: escalate-git-push
rules.description: Require human approval for all git push operations.
rules.principle: The agent must ask for human approval for all other git operations.
rules.reason: Push is a remote network operation and always requires human approval per policy.

rules.name: escalate-git-pull
rules.description: Require human approval for all git pull operations.
rules.principle: The agent must ask for human approval for all other git operations.
rules.reason: Pull is a remote network operation and always requires human approval per policy.

rules.name: escalate-git-fetch
rules.description: Require human approval for all git fetch operations.
rules.principle: The agent must ask for human approval for all other git operations.
rules.reason: Fetch is a remote network operation and always requires human approval per policy.

rules.name: escalate-git-clone
rules.description: Require human approval for all git clone operations.
rules.principle: The agent must ask for human approval for all other git operations.
rules.reason: Clone is a remote network operation and always requires human approval per policy.

rules.name: github-read-operations-allow
rules.description: Allow all read-only GitHub operations (listing, searching, reading issues, PRs, repositories, code, comments, reviews).
rules.principle: The agent may freely list, search, and read GitHub resources without human approval.
rules.reason: These are purely read-only GitHub operations explicitly permitted without approval by the user policy.

rules.name: github-write-operations-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for all GitHub write, update, create, close, or delete operations.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources requires human approval.
rules.reason: These operations create, modify, or delete GitHub resources and require explicit human approval per user policy.

listDefinitions.name: popular-news-sites
listDefinitions.principle: The agent may fetch web content from popular news sites.
listDefinitions.generationPrompt: List the domains of approximately 30 popular and well-known news websites (e.g., major national newspapers, international news agencies, and widely-read online news outlets).

listDefinitions.name: popular-development-sites
listDefinitions.principle: The agent may fetch web content from popular development sites.
listDefinitions.generationPrompt: List the domains of approximately 30 popular software development and programming reference websites (e.g., documentation hosts, package registries, developer forums, code hosting platforms, and technical reference sites).
